speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , sir . What can I do for you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I want to buy some specialties . Can you recommend me some ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure . I strongly advise you to buy a bottle of perfume and a lighter .

speaker: speaker1
text: Fine . They look nice . I will take both of them .

speaker: speaker2
text: May I have a look at your passport , please ?
